headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown scored 26 points, Jayson Tatum had 23 points and 13 rebounds and the Boston Celtics beat the Toronto Raptors 115-101 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tatum and Brown carry Celtics to 115-101 win over Raptors

headlines.description: — Nolan Traore hit five 3-pointers and finished with 23 points and seven assists, Jalen Wilson added 19 points and the Brooklyn Nets beat the Washington Wizards 121-115 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nolan Traore scores 23 points, Jalen Wilson adds 19 and Nets beat Wizards 121-115

highlights.description: Suns go on the road and beat the Bulls

headlines.description: — Devin Booker scored 30 points, Jalen Green added 25 and the Phoenix Suns ended the game on an 11-2 run to top the Chicago Bulls 120-110 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Devin Booker scores 30 points, Jalen Green adds 25 as Suns hold off Bulls 120-110

headlines.description: — Ryan Rollins scored 24 points and the Milwaukee Bucks withstood a triple-double from Memphis' Rayan Rupert to outlast the Grizzlies 131-115 in a Sunday afternoon matchup of short-handed, lottery-bound teams.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bucks outlast Grizzlies 131-115 in battle of short-handed teams
